positive: An aesthetically pleasing, symmetrical celestial body composition featuring stylized crescent moons, orbiting geometric planets, and constellations rendered in deep indigo and burnished gold linocut style. The design must have high contrast, clean black silhouettes against a pale background, perfect for a central apparel print. Include subtle, wispy cosmic dust trails and minimal, elegant astrological markings. Minimalist, graphic design, vector art, centered composition, strong negative space, Alphonse Mucha meets modern abstract astronomy, ultra-detailed, high resolution.
negative: text, words, logos, signatures, watermark, blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noisy, grain, sketch, photorealism, bokeh, gradient, cluttered, busy background
